ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the software project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead responsible for the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's code repository */,
  "programming_languages" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of programming languages used in the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "last_code_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last code review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead_id") REFERENCES team_leads ("team_lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the package belongs */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "git_hash" TEXT /* Git hash of the commit where the package was last modified */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was last modified */,
  "complexity_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the complexity of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package to which the type belongs */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "git_hash" TEXT /* Git hash of the commit where the type was last modified */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the type was last modified */,
  "complexity_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the complexity of the type */,
  "is_interface" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the type is an interface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_types_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type to which the method belongs */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "git_hash" TEXT /* Git hash of the commit where the method was last modified */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the method was last modified */,
  "complexity_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the complexity of the method */,
  "cyclomatic_complexity" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic complexity of the method */,
  "lines_of_code" INTEGER /* Number of lines of code in the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_smells" (
  "smell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code smell */,
  "smell_name" TEXT /* Name of the code smell */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code smell */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the code smell */,
  "remediation_steps" TEXT /* Steps to remediate the code smell */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the code smell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "method_smells" (
  "method_smell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method-smell association */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method affected by the code smell */,
  "smell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code smell detected in the method */,
  "date_detected" TEXT /* Date when the code smell was detected */,
  "remediation_status" TEXT /* Status of the remediation efforts */,
  "remediation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the remediation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_smell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_smells_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_smells_smell_id FOREIGN KEY ("smell_id") REFERENCES code_smells ("smell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the development team */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_leads" (
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team lead */,
  "team_lead_name" TEXT /* Name of the team lead */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team lead */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team led by the team lead */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the team lead started leading the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the team lead ended leading the team */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager who oversees the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_leads_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES team_leads ("team_lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_leads_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the developer belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the developer started working in the company */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the developer ended working in the company */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager who oversees the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developers_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES team_leads ("team_lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "method_developers" (
  "method_dev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method-developer association */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who contributed to the method */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of the method's code contributed by the developer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who reviewed the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_dev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_developers_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_developers_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_developers_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refactoring_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refactoring task */,
  "method_smell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method-smell association */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer assigned to the task */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the refactoring task */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the refactoring task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the refactoring task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the refactoring task */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who will review the refactoring task */,
  "completion_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the completion of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refactoring_tasks_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refactoring_tasks_method_smell_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_smell_id") REFERENCES method_smells ("method_smell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refactoring_tasks_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)
